name: Cosmic Breaker
tagline: Neon brick-breaker — smash crystals, catch power-ups, chase a high score.
controls: Arrow keys / A-D or drag to move · Space / tap to launch · F or Fullscreen button

name: Ring Runner
tagline: Thread glowing rings in deep space — 3D flight with keyboard or touch tilt.
controls: Arrow keys / WASD or tilt stick · Space / tap to boost · F or Fullscreen button
